title: thelypteris conformis
intro: Thelypteris conformis, also known as the Conformis Maiden-hair Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris conformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and ease congestion, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory ailments. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris conformis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of poultices or salves.
